member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictResolutionServiceExtensions
member.summary: Registers conflict resolution services into the DI container.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictResolutionServiceExtensions.AddConflictResolution(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds , , and as singletons. The caller must register separately (implementation lives in the desktop app — requires EF Core).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictDetectionError
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict detection failures.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictDetectionError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict detection failures.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.LocalFileAccessDeniedError
member.summary: Returned when access to the local file system is denied.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.LocalFileAccessDeniedError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when access to the local file system is denied.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictDetectionErrorFactory
member.summary: Factory for subtypes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictDetectionErrorFactory.AccessDenied(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the conflict queue is modified (conflict added or resolved).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChanged.#ctor(System.Guid,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChangeType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Event raised when the conflict queue is modified (conflict added or resolved).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChangeType
member.summary: The type of change that occurred on the conflict queue.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChangeType.ConflictAdded
member.summary: A new conflict was added to the queue.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictQueueChangeType.ConflictResolved
member.summary: A conflict was resolved and removed from the pending queue.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord
member.summary: Represents a single detected sync conflict that is persisted to the queue until resolved. Entities with state use class per repo conventions.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.Id
member.summary: Synthetic primary key — immutable once assigned.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.AccountId
member.summary: The account (by synthetic Guid) that owns this conflict.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.FilePath
member.summary: The file path of the conflicted item.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.AccountDisplayName
member.summary: The display name of the account (for UI only — read from Accounts table at query time).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.LocalLastModified
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the local file was last modified.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.RemoteLastModified
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the remote file was last modified.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.ConflictType
member.summary: Nature of the detected conflict.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.DetectedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the conflict was detected.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.IsResolved
member.summary: Whether the conflict has been resolved (resolved conflicts remain for audit).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord.AppliedStrategy
member.summary: The strategy applied when resolving; null while pending.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecordFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecordFactory.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictType)
member.summary: Creates a new pending .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictResolverError
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict resolver failures.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictResolverError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict resolver failures.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.FileOperationFailedError
member.summary: Returned when the file operation underlying a resolution fails.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.FileOperationFailedError.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returned when the file operation underlying a resolution fails.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictResolverErrorFactory
member.summary: Factory for subtypes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictResolverErrorFactory.FileOperationFailed(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStoreError
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict store failures.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStoreError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base discriminated union for conflict store failures.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictNotFoundError
member.summary: Returned when the requested conflict record cannot be found.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictNotFoundError.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returned when the requested conflict record cannot be found.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStorePersistenceError
member.summary: Returned when a database write fails.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStorePersistenceError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when a database write fails.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStoreErrorFactory
member.summary: Factory for subtypes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStoreErrorFactory.NotFound(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictStoreErrorFactory.Persistence(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictType
member.summary: Describes the nature of a detected sync conflict.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictType.BothModified
member.summary: The file was modified on both the local machine and OneDrive since the last sync.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictType.DeletedOnOneSide
member.summary: The file was deleted on one side while the other side still has it.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy
member.summary: The strategy chosen by the user to resolve a conflict.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy.LocalWins
member.summary: The local file overrides the remote version; the remote is discarded.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy.RemoteWins
member.summary: The remote file is downloaded; the local version is discarded.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy.KeepBoth
member.summary: Both versions are kept; the conflicting copy is renamed with a UTC timestamp suffix.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy.Skip
member.summary: The conflict is deferred and remains in the queue across sessions.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Detection.IConflictDetector
member.summary: Detects sync conflicts between a remote delta item and the local file system. Integrated into the sync engine during delta processing (CR-01).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Detection.IConflictDetector.DetectAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inspects the remote item and the local file state to determine whether a conflict exists. Returns in the success value when no conflict is detected.
member.param: Local file path of the item being processed.
When the remote copy was last modified; null for deleted items.
Size of the remote file in bytes; null for deleted items.
True when the remote delta indicates the item was deleted.
UTC time of the last completed sync; used to detect local modifications since last sync.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore
member.summary: Persistent, durable queue of conflict records backed by SQLite (CR-05, NF-05). All writes are atomic. Implementations must be singleton — the queue is app-wide state.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore.ConflictQueueChanged
member.summary: Observable that fires on the calling thread whenever the queue changes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore.AddAsync(AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically persists a new conflict to the queue.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore.GetPendingAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all unresolved conflicts, ordered newest first.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore.ResolveAsync(System.Guid,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks a conflict as resolved with the given strategy.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Persistence.IConflictStore.GetByFilePathAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all pending conflicts for a given file path (used by cascade logic).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Resolution.ICascadeService
member.summary: When a conflict is resolved, applies the same resolution to all other pending conflicts for the same file path across all accounts and sessions (CR-08).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Resolution.ICascadeService.ApplyCascadeAsync(System.Guid,System.String,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds all pending conflicts matching (excluding ) and applies to each. Returns the number of cascaded resolutions.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Resolution.IConflictResolver
member.summary: Executes a chosen resolution strategy against a conflict record (CR-03, CR-04). Never throws — all failures are returned as .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Features.Resolution.IConflictResolver.ResolveAsync(AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictRecord,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes for . LocalWins / RemoteWins deletions are logged at Warning before execution (NF-04).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage
member.summary: Compile-time log message templates for conflict resolution (NF-00).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage.ConflictDetected(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Guid,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ConflictType,System.Guid)
member.summary: Logs that a new conflict was detected and persisted.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage.ConflictResolved(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Guid,System.String,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy)
member.summary: Logs that a conflict was resolved.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage.DestructiveResolutionPending(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Logs a destructive file action before execution (NF-04).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage.CascadeResolutionApplied(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Guid,System.String,AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Domain.ResolutionStrategy)
member.summary: Logs that a cascade resolution was applied to a matching conflict.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.Infrastructure.ConflictResolutionLogMessage.ConflictCopyRenamed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Logs that a conflict file rename was performed for KeepBoth.
